title: Resveratrol for Longevity in Women Over 40: What the 2026 Research Actually Shows
author: Happy Aging Team
tags: resveratrol, longevity, SIRT1, sirtuins, pterostilbene, women over 40, NAD+, polyphenols, cellular aging
meta_title: Resveratrol for Longevity in Women Over 40: What the Research Actually Shows
meta_description: Resveratrol has a real mechanism but poor human bioavailability. Learn what 2026 research actually shows, why the animal results don't translate, and what works better for sirtuin activation in women over 40.
